title: malpighia mutabilis
intro: Malpighia mutabilis, also known as the Panama berry or purple mallow, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malpighia mutabilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional.
